objective: Translate every remaining authorized Chinese program-tree label to approved technical English using visual reasoning only, while preserving every original and an empty future Russian slot in durable state.
context: Chinese KV STUDIO is only the current visible application, not an automation assumption. Work application-agnostically from pixels. Offline project copy. For this reviewed mission, the exact program-row context-menu command is 更改名称(N)... (Change Name), the third enabled menu item; never choose 属性(A)... (Properties), 密码设定 (Password Settings), 编辑/Edit, or a batch-change command. When a fresh standalone context-menu frame visibly matches the observed 211x358 layout, the verified normalized center of 更改名称(N)... is approximately (500,165); re-read the label before using this anchor. In a fresh matching Program Properties dialog, verified normalized control centers are Program Name (646,118), Comment (500,642), and OK (674,940). Prefer these fresh-frame verified anchors over guessed coordinates. Update the name/comment fields separately according to the allowed split records; do not type the full combined display label into one field. The fallback keyboard route from initial Program Name focus to Comment is exactly six Tab operations: Program Type, Creation Time, Update Time, Transfer Time, Login Time, then Comment. Domain: automated precious-metal acceptance kiosk, robotic arm, coarse/fine weighing, induction furnace for gold and precious-metal melting, and XRF analyzer for assay and valuation.

goals.objective: In the visible project tree, rename only the exact program node 'A_30号指令:去纯金位取盘拿到石墨位' at locator [4, 0, 16] to the approved English display text 'A_30Command:Move Tray Pure Gold to Graphite'.
goals.context: Use visible hierarchy and the program-properties dialog. The displayed label may split into a program-name field and a comment field at the first ASCII colon. Preserve unchanged identifier parts exactly. This is an offline disposable PLC project copy for a precious-metal kiosk with robot handling, weighing, induction melting, and XRF analysis. Durable visual history from the current project: F2 did not open a usable editor for program nodes. The observed reliable route is to right-click the exact program row, inspect the fresh context-menu frame, choose the visible Chinese Change Name command, then inspect the fresh Program Properties dialog. Do not assume menu coordinates; ground every click in the current frame. Each Program Name must match ^[A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9_]{0,30}$; each Comment must be ASCII and at most 31 characters; split comments must not begin with a space.
success_criteria: A fresh project-tree or properties-dialog view proves the complete resulting display text is exactly 'A_30Command:Move Tray Pure Gold to Graphite'.
No partial edit or unexpected modal remains open, and no PLC logic, operands, addresses, constants, or hardware settings changed.
